feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: The Body Does Not Keep the Score: Trauma, Predictive Coding, and the Restoration of Metastability
entry.content:
Authors: S Kotler, M Mannino, G Fox, K Friston - Frontiers in Systems Neuroscience

Abstract: Abstract The Body Does Not Keep the Score: Trauma, Predictive Coding, and the Restoration of Metastability By Steven Kotler, Michael Mannino, Glenn Fox, Karl Friston For nearly a decade, the idea that" the body keeps the score" has shaped ...

Alert: Karl Friston (author alert)

entry.title: Towards a Classification of Toric and Semitoric Singular Symplectic Manifolds
entry.content:
Authors: E Miranda - Regular and Chaotic Dynamics, 2026

Abstract: In this article, we present a classification of toric bm-symplectic manifolds and outline a program for the classification of semitoric singular symplectic manifolds. As a testing ground, we begin with the case of b-symplectic manifolds, where a Delzant ...

Alert: Eva Miranda (author alert)

entry.title: Machine-enhanced reconstruction of functional connectomes unravels discriminative brain sub-systems in health and disease
entry.content:
Authors: M Grassia, V d'Andrea, K Finc, M De Domenico... - Scientific Reports, 2026

Abstract: Reconstructing functional brain networks from functional Magnetic Resonance Imaging (fMRI) data typically relies on statistical pruning, where pairwise correlations between brain Regions of Interest (ROIs) are independently thresholded, ignoring ...

Tags: brain

Alert: Manlio De Domenico (author alert)

entry.title: GEMS JWST: HATS-75 b--A giant planet with a sub-solar metallicity atmosphere orbiting an M-dwarf
entry.content:
Authors: R Ashtari, J Lustig-Yaeger, J Libby-Roberts, S Müller... - arXiv preprint arXiv ..., 2026

Abstract: HATS-75 b is one of the recently discovered Giant Exoplanets orbiting M-dwarf Stars (GEMS) with a transmission spectrum shaped by both its atmosphere and the active stellar surface it transits. As part of a JWST program studying 7 GEMS, we observed ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology, Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

Alert: Jacob Lustig-Yaeger (author alert)

entry.title: Can we improve the prediction of early onset mania and hypomania in the community?
entry.content:
Authors: J Scott, JJ Crouse, SE Medland, BL Mitchell...

Abstract: Background: There is broad agreement that the onset of bipolar disorders (BD) can be predicted by using combined estimates of familial, genetic and clinical risk. However, there is a lack of consensus about the operationalisation of different risk ...

Alert: Nick Martin (author alert)

entry.title: A unified 3D modeling framework for time-dependent behavior of two-component grouts in shield tunnelling: Insights into hardening, consolidation, and creep effects ...
entry.content:
Authors: M Sharghi, MD Fallahi, Y Yuan, Á Török, JL Zhang - Tunnelling and Underground ..., 2026

Abstract: Approximately 40% of total settlement in mechanized tunnelling occurs just behind the shield tail, where the annular gap is filled with two-component backfilling grout. Reliable prediction requires mechanistically representative modeling of this grout's ...

Alert: Török, Ákos (author alert)
